verse_text: Now Aaron shall make atonement upon its horns once a year, purging it with the blood of purification throughout your generations. It is most holy to the Lord.'

links.context: Evidently, Ptolemy thought the Jews were making up the law to keep him out. They read him the law to try to convince him ([[EXO.30:10]]; Lv 16:2, 11, 12, 15, 34). The king feels slighted and sees the high priest as beneath him.
